# feat(ci): declare Python 3.14 support across all packages

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `44c00dc70672` — feat(ci): declare Python 3.14 support across all packages

**Body**:

Python 3.14.0 has been stable since Oct 2025; the SDK was tested only
through 3.13. Adds 3.14 to the trove classifiers on all 10 packages and
to the CI test matrices that run per-version.

Verified locally on CPython 3.14.3: every package resolves cleanly via
`uv pip install --dry-run --python 3.14`, including the heavy ML chain
(torch 2.11.0, transformers 4.57.6, trl 1.1.0, accelerate 1.13.0,
peft 0.19.0, polars 1.39.3, numpy 2.4.4). Root kailash installs and
executes a workflow end-to-end on 3.14.

`requires-python = ">=3.11"` floor unchanged. Wheel build stays on 3.12
in publish-pypi.yml — pure-Python wheels are forward-compatible.

Also brings kailash-align into line with siblings (it was missing 3.13
in classifier and CI matrix).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
